headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Sysco (SYY) After The Recent Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Sysco at around US$71 a share still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in, this article breaks down what the current market price might be implying. Over the short term, the stock has seen a 13.4% decline over 7 days and a 21.8% decline over 30 days, with a 1.8% decline year to date and a 2.8% decline over the last year. Recent attention on Sysco has focused on its role as a major food distributor and how changing consumer and...
